mapper.select: SELECT f.id AS favId, f.target_type AS targetType, f.target_id AS targetId, COALESCE(ss.name, h.name, tg.title, sp.name) AS targetName, COALESCE(ss.cover_image, h.cover_image, tg.cover_image, sp.main_image) AS coverImage FROM favorite f LEFT JOIN scenic_spot ss ON f.target_type = 'SCENIC' AND f.target_id = ss.id LEFT JOIN hotel h ON f.target_type = 'HOTEL' AND f.target_id = h.id LEFT JOIN travel_guide tg ON f.target_type = 'GUIDE' AND f.target_id = tg.id LEFT JOIN specialty sp ON f.target_type = 'SPECIALTY' AND f.target_id = sp.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY f.created_at DESC
SELECT target_id FROM favorite WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND target_type = #{targetType}
